com.marklogic.spring.batch.item.writer

Class MarkLogicItemWriter

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.marklogic.spring.batch.item.writer.MarkLogicItemWriter
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.springframework.batch.item.ItemStream, org.springframework.batch.item.ItemWriter<com.marklogic.client.document.DocumentWriteOperation>
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    DataHubItemWriter

    public class MarkLogicItemWriter
extends java.lang.Object
implements org.springframework.batch.item.ItemWriter<com.marklogic.client.document.DocumentWriteOperation>, org.springframework.batch.item.ItemStream
    The MarkLogicItemWriter is an ItemWriter used to write any type of document to MarkLogic. It expects a list of DocumentWriteOperation instances, each of which encapsulates a write operation to MarkLogic.

    It depends on an instance of BatchWriter from the ml-javaclient-util. This allows for either the REST API - a DatabaseClient instance or set of instances - or XCC to be used for writing documents.

    A UriTransformer can be optionally set to transform the URI of each incoming DocumentWriteOperation.
